archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) modified for EdTech with Deep Blue & White

identity.emotion: Professional, authoritative, focused, clear, trustworthy, and modern.
identity.visual_mood: Minimalist blue-and-white theme. High contrast, generous negative space, crisp typography, avoiding clutter to maximize focus for students.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900

grids.student_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 sm:gap-8
grids.admin_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6
grids.course_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 sm:gap-8

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

glassmorphism.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors

inputs.default: block w-full rounded-lg border-0 py-2.5 text-slate-900 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-300 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-inset focus:ring-blue-600 sm:text-sm sm:leading-6

badges.live: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-red-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-red-700 ring-1 ring-inset ring-red-600/10
badges.recorded: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-blue-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-blue-700 ring-1 ring-inset ring-blue-700/10

hero_background.description: Student studying online, ideal for hero section or splash screen background

course_thumbnail_1.description: Man writing, good for 'Answer Sheet Evaluation' or 'Mains Prep'

course_thumbnail_2.description: Close up of book, good for 'Study Material' or 'Prelims Prep'

course_thumbnail_3.description: Modern classroom, good for 'Live Batches' or 'Foundation Course'

testimonial_avatar.description: Student sitting, good for testimonial or success story avatar

instructions_to_main_agent: Import 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css.

Implement the Animated Splash Screen as a full-screen entry point with the provided logo fading in over the hero_background image (with a heavy dark blue overlay bg-blue-900/80) and typography for the Sanskrit Shlokas.
Use Shadcn UI for the multi-step registration (Form, Input, Button) and customize them heavily to fit the clean, high-contrast blue-and-white theme.
For the Student Home Page, use the 'Bento' grid layout for desktop and stack them on mobile. Prioritize course discovery with clear badges (Live, Recorded, Free).
Admin Dashboard must follow the 'Control Room' dense grid, with flat cards, and no excessive shadows.
Do not use fully transparent headers over hero images; always use the glassmorphism header utility.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
